name: Hummus with Pita Toasts
recipeIngredient: 2 pita loaves, each cut into 6-inch rounds
1 can (19 oz) chick peas, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Split each pita round into 8 triangles.
2. Mince and mash the garlic with salt.
3. Brush the rough sides of the pita triangles with butter and sprinkle with salt to taste.
4. Bake on a baking sheet in the top third of a preheated 400°F oven until golden, about 6-8 minutes.
5. In a food processor, blend chick peas, tahini, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic paste, and salt. Add enough water to cover the mixture to taste until smooth. This can be made up to 1 day in advance and chilled.
6. Sprinkle with chopped parsley and drizzle a bit of olive oil before serving with pita toasts.
